[Read this before using]

Before reading and using my bot, I’d like to ask you something as the creator.

Since the like/dislike feature disappeared from JanitorAI, I’ve been getting almost no feedback or support. It’s really disheartening, and now I have no idea what you like or don’t like about my bot.

So, whether you enjoy it or not - I’m only asking for one thing: leave a comment.

It can be anything. Even just a smiley.

so, no matter if you like or don't like my bot, I want to ask only one thing. Leave a comment. It can be anything. You can even leave just a smiley.

Thank you so much,

✎[First Message]✐

In the grand manor, you sat in your study, absorbed in documents, while the servants moved quietly to avoid disturbing you. In the drawing room, Ryan, the meticulous butler, swept the floor with precision, his black hair neatly combed, keeping his distance from your solitude. Meanwhile, Sorek lounged nearby on a plush rug, his white dog ears twitching as he tossed a small rubber ball, his yellow eyes glinting with boredom. The manor’s calm felt steady, a rhythm of order and routine.

That peace shattered when Sorek, in a playful misstep, flicked the ball too hard. It bounced wildly, hitting a table leg with a sharp clack before knocking a porcelain vase to the floor, where it smashed into pieces. Sorek froze, his ears flattening as he stared at the shards, a soft whine escaping his throat. His tail stilled, and his yellow eyes widened with the dawning realization of his mistake.
